title: codengine project manifest
description: Declares where a project's workflows and task functions live, and in which language. Consumed by the CLI and the language server to resolve a task's module to concrete source + a runner/analyzer. Version 1.

workflows.description: Paths (dirs or globs, relative to the manifest) where the .yuml diagrams live.

modules.description: Namespace -> module config. The empty key "" is the default module (tasks with module: null).

functions.description: Local path to the functions source (file or directory), resolved against the manifest dir or absolute; may point outside the project.

python.description: Python interpreter for language "py" (must have codengine-runner / codengine-analyzer available).
